old_post_content:
CeraVe Hydrating Foaming Oil Cleanser 236ml

CeraVe Hydrating Foaming Oil Cleanser is a unique oil-to-foam formula that gently dissolves makeup, sunscreen, and impurities while maintaining the skin's moisture balance. Enriched with rosehip oil, ceramides, and hyaluronic acid, it cleanses without stripping or leaving a greasy residue.

Key Benefits

  • Oil-to-foam texture — effectively removes makeup and SPF
  • Rosehip oil nourishes and softens while cleansing
  • Ceramides 1, 3 & 6-II maintain the skin barrier
  • Hyaluronic acid prevents moisture loss during cleansing
  • Non-comedogenic, fragrance-free, soap-free
  • Suitable for combination, normal to dry, and sensitive skin

How to Use

Apply to dry or wet skin. Massage in circular motions to emulsify and dissolve impurities. Add water to foam. Rinse thoroughly. Use morning or night.

Available at Emart — authentic CeraVe in Bangladesh. Cash on Delivery nationwide.
